channel.title: Republican Accountability — DNC Toolkit
channel.description: The latest shareable graphics and messaging from the DNC's Republican Accountability toolkit.

item.title: Trump's 2027 budget demands $1.5 trillion for military spending while gutting th
item.description:
Trump's 2027 budget demands $1.5 trillion for military spending while gutting the programs everyday Americans depend on — slashing $5 billion from NIH, $1.3 billion from FEMA grants, $354 million from HBCUs and minority-serving institutions, and fully eliminating LIHEAP, Job Corps, and Fair Housing protections. While Republicans funnel trillions into the Pentagon, they're ripping the safety net out from under working families, students, disaster survivors, and the most vulnerable among us. Democrats are fighting back — because no one should go cold in winter or lose their home so defense contractors can get richer.

Tags: Economy

item.title: Donald Trump said it out loud: "The United States can't take care of daycare. We
item.description:
Donald Trump said it out loud: "The United States can't take care of daycare. We're fighting wars." Republicans have made their priorities crystal clear — endless military spending over the childcare that working parents desperately need. While millions of American families struggle to afford safe childcare, Trump and Republicans choose bombs over babies. Democrats believe every family deserves affordable childcare, and we will never stop fighting for it.

Tags: Economy

item.title: Trump's corruption is on full display: he personally bought up to $5 million in
item.description: Trump's corruption is on full display: he personally bought up to $5 million in Dell stock, and then his administration handed Dell a massive $9.7 billion government contract. Republicans are using the presidency as a personal profit machine while hardworking Americans foot the bill. Democrats are fighting to end this pay-to-play corruption and hold Trump accountable for enriching himself at taxpayers' expense.

item.title: Trump and Republican leaders celebrated at the White House as 2.5 million childr
item.description: Trump and Republican leaders celebrated at the White House as 2.5 million children lost food assistance because of Trump's so-called 'One Big Beautiful Bill.' While Republicans cheered and clapped, millions of families are now wondering how they'll feed their kids. Democrats are fighting to restore every dollar of nutrition assistance that Republicans ripped away from hungry children.

item.title: Trump is moving to drive bison off federal lands in Montana — animals that were
item.description: Trump is moving to drive bison off federal lands in Montana — animals that were nearly hunted to extinction in the 19th century and have only recently begun to recover thanks to decades of conservation efforts. Republicans are erasing America's natural heritage and betraying the communities, tribes, and conservationists who fought to bring these iconic animals back. Democrats stand with the land, the wildlife, and the people of Montana — not with the corporate interests that want our public lands for themselves.

item.title: Trump's propaganda campaign is out of control — he's stamping his name on U.S. p
item.description: Trump's propaganda campaign is out of control — he's stamping his name on U.S. passports, the Kennedy Center, the U.S. Institute of Peace, Navy warships, national parks passes, and even dollar coins. This isn't leadership — this is a dictator's vanity project, using the American government as his personal brand. Democrats believe our public institutions belong to the American people, not to one man's ego.

item.title: Breaking: Pam Bondi has been fired — another chaotic casualty of Trump's revolvi
item.description: Breaking: Pam Bondi has been fired — another chaotic casualty of Trump's revolving door of loyalists and yes-men who put his personal agenda above the rule of law. Republicans have turned the Justice Department into a political weapon, and no one who stands in Trump's way lasts long. Democrats are committed to restoring independence, integrity, and accountability to our justice system.

item.title: Democrats are fighting back — again. The DSCC, DCCC, DGA, and DNC have filed a l
item.description: Democrats are fighting back — again. The DSCC, DCCC, DGA, and DNC have filed a lawsuit challenging Trump's illegal executive order attacking vote by mail, because every American has the right to vote safely and freely. Republicans are terrified of a fully participating electorate, so they're trying to rig the rules before the next election. We will not let them steal your voice — we will see them in court.

item.title: This is the man Republicans put in the Oval Office — Trump openly admitting he s
item.description: This is the man Republicans put in the Oval Office — Trump openly admitting he surrounds himself with people he can look down on because "it makes me feel better." While Americans are struggling with rising costs and a collapsing safety net, their president is focused on his own ego. Democrats believe leadership means lifting people up — not using them to feel superior.

item.title: The family of a slain American servicemember is calling for Trump's war in Iran
item.description: The family of a slain American servicemember is calling for Trump's war in Iran to end — a grieving family whose loved one paid the ultimate price while Trump plays war games with their lives. While Republicans beat the drums of endless conflict, real families are left to mourn in uniforms and grief. Democrats stand with our troops and their families — bring them home, stop the reckless brinkmanship, and choose diplomacy over death.

item.title: Trump's EPA is moving to weaken safety limits on ethylene oxide — a known cancer
item.description: Trump's EPA is moving to weaken safety limits on ethylene oxide — a known cancer-causing chemical that may damage fertility and harm the unborn — while also rolling back mercury restrictions from coal-burning plants. Republicans are literally choosing corporate profits over the health of American families, children, and workers. Democrats will never stop fighting for clean air, safe communities, and an EPA that protects people, not polluters.

item.title: A new Navigator poll shows that 20% of Trump voters now say they regret their vo
item.description:
A new Navigator poll shows that 20% of Trump voters now say they regret their vote — up 6 points in just weeks — as the chaos, cruelty, and broken promises pile up. Americans are waking up to the reality of what Republicans promised versus what they delivered: tariff chaos, gutted healthcare, and a president who only serves himself. Democrats are ready to welcome everyone who is ready to fight for an America that works for all of us.

Tags: Vote

item.title: A wall of shame: 52 Senate Republicans — including Ted Cruz, Lindsey Graham, Mar
item.description: A wall of shame: 52 Senate Republicans — including Ted Cruz, Lindsey Graham, Marsha Blackburn, and more — voted against reining in Trump's reckless march toward war with Iran. While brave American service members and their families bear the cost of endless conflict, these senators handed Trump a blank check to drag us into another war without congressional oversight. Democrats are fighting to restore the constitutional checks on executive war powers that Republicans are determined to destroy.

item.title: Even Trump's own advisor Laura Loomer is sounding the alarm: 'The GOP is losing
item.description: Even Trump's own advisor Laura Loomer is sounding the alarm: 'The GOP is losing in 2026 and 2028.' When the extremists within Trump's own inner circle admit their agenda is failing the American people, you know change is coming. Democrats are organizing, mobilizing, and fighting back — and voters across the country are ready to hold Republicans accountable at the ballot box.

item.title: In his own words: Donald Trump declared 'I'm allowed to destroy the country.' Th
item.description: In his own words: Donald Trump declared 'I'm allowed to destroy the country.' This isn't an exaggeration or a misquote — this is the President of the United States openly admitting his willingness to wreck our economy, our institutions, and our democracy. Democrats are fighting every single day to protect the American people from a president who sees destruction as a right rather than a failure.

item.title: Trump is deliberately hurting children — cutting childhood cancer research, slas
item.description: Trump is deliberately hurting children — cutting childhood cancer research, slashing funding for students with disabilities, gutting food programs for low-income kids, and withholding $4 billion from public education. While families struggle, Trump is waging war on the most vulnerable among us. Democrats are standing up for every child's right to health, education, and a future free from poverty.

item.title: Breaking: Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt confirmed that Trump personally posts
item.description: Breaking: Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt confirmed that Trump personally posts on Truth Social — directly contradicting the White House's claim that a racist video depicting the Obamas as apes was posted by a staffer. This administration doesn't just tolerate racism — it amplifies it from the top. Democrats demand accountability and will not allow the White House to be a megaphone for hate.

item.title: The American people are waking up: a Marquette poll shows Trump's approval ratin
item.description: The American people are waking up: a Marquette poll shows Trump's approval rating among white voters has gone negative for the very first time since he took office. His reckless tariffs, attacks on Social Security and Medicare, and chaotic leadership are costing him the trust of the very voters he relied on. Democrats are ready to offer a real alternative — one that puts working families first.

item.title: In 2006, Donald Trump said of Jeffrey Epstein's crimes, 'Everyone has known he's
item.description: In 2006, Donald Trump said of Jeffrey Epstein's crimes, 'Everyone has known he's been doing this' — and yet he remained close allies with a convicted sex trafficker. This is the character of the man Republicans have handed the keys to the country. Democrats believe survivors deserve justice, truth, and a government that holds the powerful accountable — not one that looks the other way.

item.title: Despite claiming he barely knew Jeffrey Epstein, Trump is referenced in over 5,3
item.description: Despite claiming he barely knew Jeffrey Epstein, Trump is referenced in over 5,300 of the Epstein files — with more than 38,000 mentions of Trump, his wife, Mar-a-Lago, and related phrases according to a New York Times investigation. Republicans continue to bury this story and protect the powerful, while survivors still wait for justice. Democrats are demanding full transparency and accountability from this administration.
